word: H7114 - קָצַר - qâtsar - kaw-tsar' - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: קצר

Transliteration: qâtsar

Phonetic: kaw-tsar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be short, be impatient, be vexed, be grieved
    1. (Qal) to be short
    2. (Piel) to shorten
    3. (Hiphil) to shorten
  2. to reap, harvest
    1. (Qal) to reap, harvest
    2. (Hiphil) to reap, harvest

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2061,2062

Part(s) of speech: Verb
